zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Mortain於大約1054年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-時，她的父親Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain24歲，母親Maud de Montgomery11052歲。她於大約1079年與André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1115年在她的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Mortain于大约1054年出生在法国巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-时，她的父亲Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain24岁，母亲Maud de Montgomery11052岁。她于大约1079年与André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1115年在她的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mortain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Mortain was born about 1054, in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, was 24 and her mother, Maud de Montgomery, was 11052. She married André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré about 1079, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1115, in her hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Mortain est née environ 1054, à Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maud de Montgomery, avait 11052 ans. Elle a épousé André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré environ 1079, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1115, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Mortain um 1054 in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain 24 und ihre Mutter Maud de Montgomery 11052. Sie hat um 1079 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1115 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Mortain è nata il circa 1054 nel Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Maud de Montgomery, aveva 11052 anni. Lei sposato André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré circa 1079, nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1115, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Mortainが約1054年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェで生まれた時，父Robert de Conteville Count of Mortainは24歳，母Maud de Montgomeryは11052歳であった。約1079年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeでAndré de Vitré Seigneur de Vitréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1115年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Mortain(이)가 대략 1054년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 모르타그니-오-퍼체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Montgomery(은)는 11052세였다. 그녀는 대략 1079년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1115년 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1054–about 1115: tany ho any amin'ny 1054–tany ho any amin'ny 1115

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Mortain nasceu aproximadamente 1054, em Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Montgomery, tinha 11052 anos. Ela casou-se com André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré aproximadamente 1079, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1115, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Mortain родилась около 1054 г. в местности мортагне-ау-пирч, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Montgomery, 11052. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré около 1079 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1115 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.about 1054–about 1115: e tusa o le 1054–e tusa o le 1115

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Mortain nació aproximadamente 1054, en Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Maud de Montgomery, tenía 11052 años. Se casó con André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré aproximadamente 1079, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1115, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
